<!-- START AUTOGENERATED KEY ELEMENTS -->
<b>USCDI+ Quality Elements:</b>
<ul>
<li>diagnosis: (USCDI+ Quality) Pertinent diagnosis information</li>
<li>diagnosis.sequence: (USCDI+ Quality) Diagnosis instance identifier</li>
<li>diagnosis.diagnosis[x]: (USCDI+ Quality) Nature of illness or problem</li>
<li>diagnosis.onAdmission: (USCDI+ Quality) Present on admission</li>
</ul>
<!-- END AUTOGENERATED KEY ELEMENTS -->
